name: PAO Sovcomflot
summary: PAO Sovcomflot, a shipping company, provides maritime transportation services for hydrocarbons in Russia. It operates in five segments: Offshore Services, Gas Transportation, Crude Oil Transportation, Oil Products Transportation, and Other. The company is involved in the transportation of crude oil, petroleum products and bulk cargoes, and liquefied natural gas and liquefied petroleum gas; supply and servicing of offshore platforms; management of terminals; shuttle shipment of oil; and offshore seismic exploration activities. As of October 28, 2020, it operated through a fleet of 146 vessels with a total deadweight of approximately 12.6 million tons. The company was formerly known as OAO Sovcomflot and changed its name to PAO Sovcomflot in December 2014. PAO Sovcomflot was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Moscow, Russia.
